{{Infobox artifact
| name = Emperor's crown (The Elder Empire: Shadow)
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Emperor]]'s crown serves as a primary symbol of imperial authority and rule. Unlike the imitation silver version used by a body double during a fraudulent coronation, the authentic crown is a powerful artifact. It has been utilized by [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] to exert mental influence over numerous [[Consultants]] on [[Gray Island]]. [[The crown]] is a significant object of political concern, as the prospect of a [[Great Elder]] seizing control of it represents a catastrophic scenario for the world.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Calder Marten]] was wearing [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s crown.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[The Emperor]]'s crown is being used to force [[Consultants]] to betray their cause.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Navigator]] wears [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s crown.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[The Emperor]]'s crown can control any loyal citizens of the Empire.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Consultants]] have no defense against [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s crown without [[Bastion's Veil]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Champions]] stripped [[Calder]]'s body of [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s crown.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
